title: Ways to Split Array Into Three Subarrays
titleCn: 将数组分成三个子数组的方案数

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,1] Output: 1 Explanation: The only good way to split nums is [1] [1] [1].
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The only good way to split nums is [1] [1] [1].

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,2,2,5,0] Output: 3 Explanation: There are three good ways of splitting nums: [1] [2] [2,2,5,0] [1] [2,2] [2,5,0] [1,2] [2,2] [5,0]
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: There are three good ways of splitting nums: [1] [2] [2,2,5,0] [1] [2,2] [2,5,0] [1,2] [2,2] [5,0]

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1] Output: 0 Explanation: There is no good way to split nums.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There is no good way to split nums.
